findings: squads_launched falls back to proof.squad_leads_started when telemetry missing — masks stale state
50 squads / 0 workers produces no warning (workers check requires truthy workers_launched)
monitor does not enforce 'no silent downgrade' — only the commander bundle sets status
monitor reads swarm-state.json only; child-agents.jsonl proof not directly verified
squad_leads_started and squad_leads_launched can diverge with no sync check
workers_target=0 causes no division but incomplete-proof warning becomes inert
